Local value names must use snake_case
null_resource is deprecated — use terraform_data
Variables with sensitive names must have sensitive = true
lifecycle ignore_changes must not use the all keyword
terraform.workspace must not be used in resource configuration
count.index must not appear in resource name attributes
Terraform block must declare required_providers
local_file resources must set explicit file permissions
